nasb.text: But Mary was standing outside the tomb weeping; and so, as she wept, she stooped and looked into the tomb;

esv.text: But Mary stood weeping outside the tomb, and as she wept she stooped to look into the tomb.

cnv.text: 馬利亞站在墳墓外面哭泣。她哭的時候，屈身往裡面觀看，

ccb.text: 玛丽亚却站在坟墓外面哭泣，边哭边往坟墓里面看，

csbs.text: 玛丽亚却站在墓穴外面哭。她哭着，弯腰往墓穴里看，
